sections.paragraph: masc. (from the root יָבַל No. 1, which see), an inundation of waters, a deluge, used of Noah’s flood, Gen 6:17 7:6 , , 10 , 17 9:11 , 28 10:1 , 32 Gen 10:32of the ocean of heaven, Psa 29:10. [In Thes. this passage is applied like the rest to the deluge, referring this expression to the Lord having there sat as judge, and he will sit for ever.]
